= Chapter 5: Feature Module Architecture and Workflow Contracts

== 5.1 Why this chapter exists

Chapters 1-4 defined platform, database, data engine, and UI system. This chapter defines the application module map: which page owns which business workflow, where side effects originate, and how cross-page integrity is preserved.

At runtime, feature modules are route-bounded and coordinated through shared hooks and invalidation families.

Route entrypoints:

. Dashboard route in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L818[src/App.jsx]
. Transactions route in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L819[src/App.jsx]
. Monthly route in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L820[src/App.jsx]
. Analytics route in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L821[src/App.jsx]
. Bills route in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L822[src/App.jsx]
. Loans route in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L823[src/App.jsx]
. Reconciliation route in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L824[src/App.jsx]
. Guide route in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L825[src/App.jsx]
. Settings route in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L826[src/App.jsx]
. Report Bug route in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L828[src/App.jsx]

Global cross-domain freshness contract:

. Realtime invalidation families are declared in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L85[src/App.jsx].
. The families map directly to transactions, liabilities, and loans domains in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L86[src/App.jsx].
. Invalidation execution is centralized in GlobalRealtimeSync in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L535[src/App.jsx].

'''

== 5.2 Feature module map

|===
| Module | Primary Route | Core Hook Surface | Primary Responsibility
| Dashboard | / | useRecentTransactions, useMonthSummary, useRunningBalance | Daily command center and action routing
| Transactions | /transactions | useTransactions + save/remove mutations | Canonical ledger editing and export
| Bills | /bills | useLiabilities + liability mutations | Obligation tracking and paid-state conversion
| Loans | /loans | useLoans + loan mutations | Personal credit/debit lifecycle tracking
| Reconciliation | /reconciliation | useReconciliationReviews + useTransactions | Data-quality QA and statement linking
| Monthly | /monthly | useMonthSummary, useLiabilitiesByMonth, useBudgets | Month-close performance and planning
| Analytics | /analytics | useYearSummary, useYearDailyExpenseTotals | Strategic yearly intelligence
| Guide | /guide | local feature-card model | Product adoption and workflow coaching
| Settings | /settings | useAuth + reminders utilities | Identity, reminders, profile controls
| Report Bug | /report-bug | submit_bug_report RPC + edge notify | Structured operational feedback
|===

'''

== 5.3 Dashboard module (daily command center)

Module anchor: link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx#L223[src/pages/Dashboard.jsx]

=== Inputs

Dashboard composes multiple data surfaces:

. Recent ledger stream through link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx#L294[src/pages/Dashboard.jsx].
. Current month aggregate through link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx#L301[src/pages/Dashboard.jsx].
. Running balance horizon through link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx#L310[src/pages/Dashboard.jsx].
. Cross-domain sheet action bridge via AddTransactionSheet in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx#L1175[src/pages/Dashboard.jsx].

=== Behavioral contract

. The hero is treated as critical-first content and blocks on summary + balance load in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx#L318[src/pages/Dashboard.jsx].
. Background refreshes never tear primary layout; they are signaled as non-blocking sync text in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx#L319[src/pages/Dashboard.jsx] and link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx#L816[src/pages/Dashboard.jsx].
. Heavy secondary surfaces are intentionally delayed for first-paint stability.

=== UX responsibility

Dashboard is a routing origin, not a deep editor. It exposes directional nudges and routes users to specialized modules for precision operations.

Signals and advanced surfaces:

. Dashboard nudges in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx#L841[src/pages/Dashboard.jsx].
. Daily variance/bubble heatmap in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx#L859[src/pages/Dashboard.jsx].
. Cash risk radar surface in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx#L886[src/pages/Dashboard.jsx].

'''

== 5.4 Transactions module (source-of-truth editor)

Module anchor: link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Transactions.jsx#L52[src/pages/Transactions.jsx]

=== Inputs and filtering pipeline

. Primary ledger query with type/category/search/date/limit filters in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Transactions.jsx#L126[src/pages/Transactions.jsx].
. Filter chips and date presets are UI projections of query arguments in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Transactions.jsx#L429[src/pages/Transactions.jsx] and link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Transactions.jsx#L449[src/pages/Transactions.jsx].
. Route-focus deep links are resolved by focus param and scroll-to logic.

=== Editing and mutation flow

. Transaction edits and creates are routed through AddTransactionSheet in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Transactions.jsx#L618[src/pages/Transactions.jsx].
. Delete flow delegates to removeTransactionMutation via handleDelete in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Transactions.jsx#L206[src/pages/Transactions.jsx].
. Quick add entrypoints exist in both top action cluster and FAB in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Transactions.jsx#L372[src/pages/Transactions.jsx] and link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Transactions.jsx#L614[src/pages/Transactions.jsx].

=== Operational exports

. Filter-aware CSV export is implemented by exportCSV in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Transactions.jsx#L230[src/pages/Transactions.jsx].

=== Domain rule

Transactions is the canonical record editor. Other modules may create derived transaction side effects, but this page remains the precision correction surface.

'''

== 5.5 Bills module (obligation lifecycle)

Module anchor: link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Bills.jsx#L29[src/pages/Bills.jsx]

=== Inputs and state partitioning

. Bills consumes pending and paid sets from useLiabilities in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Bills.jsx#L33[src/pages/Bills.jsx].
. UI tab state is URL-aware and supports query-driven landing in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Bills.jsx#L32[src/pages/Bills.jsx] and link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Bills.jsx#L101[src/pages/Bills.jsx].
. Pending items are enriched into overdue/dueSoon/later buckets in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Bills.jsx#L71[src/pages/Bills.jsx].

=== Core workflows

. Add bill via addLiabilityMutation in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Bills.jsx#L196[src/pages/Bills.jsx].
. Mark paid via markLiabilityPaidMutation in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Bills.jsx#L212[src/pages/Bills.jsx].
. Delete via deleteLiabilityMutation in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Bills.jsx#L229[src/pages/Bills.jsx].

=== Integrity behavior

. Delete uses optimistic hide with rollback-on-failure semantics in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Bills.jsx#L223[src/pages/Bills.jsx].
. Pending card interactions disable appropriately while pay/delete is in flight.
. Paid history and pending queue are intentionally separated to prevent accidental operational mixing.

=== Planning overlays

. Due-soon amount/count and urgency bar are computed in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Bills.jsx#L52[src/pages/Bills.jsx] and link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Bills.jsx#L86[src/pages/Bills.jsx].
. Paid-side intelligence is surfaced via BillPaymentInsights in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Bills.jsx#L399[src/pages/Bills.jsx].

=== Sheet workflow contract

The add-bill sheet includes recurrence semantics and due date normalization in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Bills.jsx#L509[src/pages/Bills.jsx].

'''

== 5.6 Loans module (credit and settlement lifecycle)

Module anchor: link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Loans.jsx#L27[src/pages/Loans.jsx]

=== Inputs and segmentation

. Loans consumes three streams (given, taken, settled) through useLoans.
. UI tab partition is directional, not chronological, so risk and receivable views remain explicit.

=== Core workflows

. Add loan via addLoanMutation in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Loans.jsx#L93[src/pages/Loans.jsx].
. Partial payment via recordLoanPaymentMutation in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Loans.jsx#L115[src/pages/Loans.jsx].
. Full settlement shortcut via recordLoanPaymentMutation with remaining amount in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Loans.jsx#L130[src/pages/Loans.jsx].
. Delete via deleteLoanMutation in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Loans.jsx#L142[src/pages/Loans.jsx].

=== Domain mechanics

. Progress visualization uses loanProgress and settled-vs-principal in card rendering.
. Interest accrual is displayed as contextual decision support.
. Payment sheet constrains valid amount and offers quick fills in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Loans.jsx#L420[src/pages/Loans.jsx].

=== Integrity behavior

. Optimistic rows are visibly marked as syncing.
. Action controls are disabled while delete/payment operations are active.

'''

== 5.7 Reconciliation module (data-quality QA engine)

Module anchor: link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx#L86[src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx]

=== Inputs and fallback design

. Reconciliation draws transaction candidates from useTransactions in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx#L99[src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx].
. Review states come from useReconciliationReviews in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx#L109[src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx].
. If review table is unavailable, local reviewed state fallback is used in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx#L113[src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx].

=== Tabbed architecture

Reconciliation is already organized into three functional tabs:

. Queue tab: unresolved and QA-driven fixes.
. Matching tab: statement-line parsing and alias learning.
. Overview tab: funnel and turnaround metrics.

Tabs are defined in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx#L476[src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx] and rendered from link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx#L527[src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx].

=== Queue workflows

. Quality filters and review-state filters operate as staged triage in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx#L550[src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx].
. Category correction path uses saveTransactionMutation and then persists review state in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx#L443[src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx].
. Mark-reviewed flow persists structured review rows in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx#L417[src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx].

=== Matching workflows

. Statement input parsing and match generation are built from parseStatementLines and matchStatementEntries.
. Link decision uses upsertReconciliationReview with linked status in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx#L390[src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx].
. False-positive feedback loop uses reportReconciliationFalsePositive in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx#L429[src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx].
. Alias reset capability is available through clearLearnedReconciliationAliases in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx#L462[src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx].

=== Metrics and governance

. Funnel and linked conversion are built in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx#L251[src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx].
. Turnaround distribution and median resolution are computed from review history in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx#L271[src/pages/Reconciliation.jsx].

Reconciliation therefore functions as a reliability layer for every insight module, not merely a helper screen.

'''

== 5.8 Analytics and Monthly modules (decision surfaces)

== 5.8.1 Analytics module

Module anchor: link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Analytics.jsx#L87[src/pages/Analytics.jsx]

Responsibilities:

. Year-level strategic reporting from useYearSummary and daily totals in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Analytics.jsx#L98[src/pages/Analytics.jsx].
. Multi-chart synthesis (cashflow, composition, runway, pareto, simulator).
. Scenario and recommendation framing from normalized yearly data.

Behavioral notes:

. Heavy secondary analysis is delayed for smoother entry rendering.
. Empty-year state routes users back to data capture if no signal exists.

== 5.8.2 Monthly module

Primary role: month-close control plane integrating summary, liabilities, budgets, reconciliation queue, and trend surfaces.

Core anchor points:

. Module entry in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Monthly.jsx#L30[src/pages/Monthly.jsx].
. Month summary source in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Monthly.jsx#L42[src/pages/Monthly.jsx].
. Month-scoped transaction and liabilities reads in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Monthly.jsx#L45[src/pages/Monthly.jsx] and link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Monthly.jsx#L52[src/pages/Monthly.jsx].
. Budget integration in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Monthly.jsx#L53[src/pages/Monthly.jsx].

Monthly is where operational flows (transactions/bills/reconciliation) are converted into period-close judgments.

'''

== 5.9 Cross-module workflow chains

These are the most important end-to-end contracts in the system.

== 5.9.1 Bill payment chain

. User marks pending bill as paid in Bills page.
. Bills page calls markLiabilityPaidMutation in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Bills.jsx#L212[src/pages/Bills.jsx].
. Hook layer updates liabilities caches and related transaction surfaces through cross-family invalidation.
. Dashboard, Monthly, and Analytics surfaces consume the refreshed totals and due-state posture.

== 5.9.2 Loan payment chain

. User records payment from Loans page in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Loans.jsx#L115[src/pages/Loans.jsx].
. recordLoanPaymentMutation updates loan progress and injects corresponding transaction-side effects.
. Transactional surfaces and summaries converge without waiting for a full manual refresh.

== 5.9.3 Reconciliation correction chain

. User sets missing category from Queue card in Reconciliation.
. saveTransactionMutation runs and persists ledger correction.
. Reconciliation review is persisted in the same interaction path.
. Downstream insights and dashboards consume corrected categorization.

== 5.9.4 Global freshness chain

. Domain writes suppress duplicate immediate realtime refetches.
. Realtime listener invalidates transaction/liability/loan families via centralized policies in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L85[src/App.jsx].
. UI remains stable while eventually converging to server truth.

'''

Report Bug closes the reliability loop by capturing structured defect telemetry.

Key structures:

. Module entry in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/ReportBug.jsx#L24[src/pages/ReportBug.jsx].

. submit_bug_report RPC invocation in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/ReportBug.jsx#L184[src/pages/ReportBug.jsx].
. Edge notification invoke in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/ReportBug.jsx#L207[src/pages/ReportBug.jsx].

'''

== 5.11 Extension guide for new feature modules

When adding a new module, keep these contracts:

. Assign a clear route boundary and keep module purpose singular.
. Reuse existing hook families where possible before introducing new ones.
. Define optimistic behavior and rollback boundaries before implementing UI actions.
. Ensure downstream modules that depend on the data family are covered by invalidation policy.
. Add guidance representation in Guide when the module changes user operating behavior.
. Add telemetry/bug-report context fields if the module introduces novel failure modes.

This preserves Kosha's current architectural posture: specialized page workflows over a shared, integrity-first data substrate.
